[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01001011 4
1 11100010 4
2 11000010 3
3 10110101 5
4 00111100 4
5 00011000 2
6 11100111 6
7 11111111 a

01 10 11111111 a match 7
12 21 11011001 5
23 32 11111110 7

56 65 01111111 7
67 76 11001011 5
70 07 11100111 6 match 6

57 75 11111111 a match 7

36 63 11111110 7

50 05 11111111 a match 7
61 16 11011011 6
72 27 11001011 5

26 62 11001010 4
37 73 11111111 a match 7
